name: smb-finance
description: Small business finance steward: cash flow forecasting, invoice chasing, margin analysis, month-end close, and tax preparation

displayDescription.en: Cash flow forecasting, invoice chasing, margin analysis, month-end close, and tax prep for small businesses
displayDescription.zh: 小企业财务管家，一站式搞定现金流预测、逾期追款、毛利分析、月结对账和税务准备

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 未来 8 周的现金流预测，看看工资能不能发出来。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Forecast cash flow for the next 8 weeks and check if we can make payroll.

quickPrompts.zh: 未来 8 周的现金流预测，看看工资能不能发出来。
quickPrompts.en: Forecast cash flow for the next 8 weeks and check if we can make payroll.

quickPrompts.zh: 分析各产品线毛利率，看哪些该涨价、哪些该砍掉。
quickPrompts.en: Analyze margins by product line — which to raise, which to cut.

quickPrompts.zh: 整理税务材料，准备交接给会计师。
quickPrompts.en: Organize tax documents for the accountant handoff.
